title: minor issue with $fscanf
body:
---


Author Name: **Ashutosh Das**

Original Date: 2010-04-19
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

### Minor issue with $fscanf

There seems to be a minor issue with $fscanf system task. It doesn't seem to update the scanned variable untill a $display statement is encountered. Attached is the modified test case file 'test_regress/t/t_sys_file_scan.v'. In the file, The $display statement immidiately following the $fscanf is commented out.
